_comment: Hand-authored function/cost/datasheet lookup keyed by MPN. Merged into each BomLine at load time. Seed values from CONTEXT.md §4 (the unified component catalog). Unit costs are USD, from the 10-unit batch in COGS-LIST.

SC0918.function: The MCU. Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040 @ 133 MHz, 264 KB SRAM, 2 MB onboard flash). Runs the libros firmware. SC0918 and SC0915 are two RPi distributor SKUs for the same Pico board.

OSO-BOOK-C2-01.function: Castellated e-paper driver submodule. Generates the ±22 V and ±15 V rails the e-paper panel needs, converts signal levels between the Pico and the display, and drives the FFC ribbon. Ordered pre-assembled from JLCPCB or PCBWay; soldered to the C1 main board via castellated edge pads.
OSO-BOOK-C2-01.notes: Separate PCBA job — cost not included in the C1 BOM totals. Real per-unit $30-80 depending on fab house and volume. Three board revisions exist: C2-01 (old JLCPCB, oversized), C2-02 (PCBWay, current), C2-03 (new JLCPCB, replaces C2-01). All share an identical schematic; only R1's package size differs (0402 vs 0603). The BOM ref 'OSO-BOOK-C2-01' in 1-click-bom.csv is stale — use C2-03 for JLCPCB orders.

MEM2075-00-140-01-A.function: Push/push microSD card slot. Holds the book library on a microSD card (plain UTF-8 text files, title on line 1).

GD25Q16CTIGR.function: 16 Mb SPI NOR flash. Stores the GNU Unifont + per-language glyph data that doesn't fit in the Pico's 2 MB flash. Read over the shared SPI bus via /BABEL_CS.
GD25Q16CTIGR.notes: Canonical part — don't confuse with the pin-compatible MX25L1606E, which an earlier inference misidentified.

DMG3415U-7.function: P-channel MOSFET. Q1 (gate = EN / GPIO18) switches the +3.3VP rail powering the SD card and flash chip. Q2 (gate = ~EN2 / GPIO15) switches a secondary load (likely the C2 module's 3.3 V supply). Don't confuse with C2's Q1 which is an N-channel IRLML0100.
DMG3415U-7.notes: COGS-LIST labels these 'M channel'; that's a typo for 'P channel'.

CL31B106KQHNFNE.function: 10 µF MLCC, 1206, ≥6.3 V. Bulk decoupling on the battery rail (+BATT) and the switched 3.3 V rail (+3.3VP).

CL21B105KAFNNNE.function: 1 µF MLCC, 0805, ≥6.3 V. Local decoupling on the 3V3 rail.

RMCF1206JT10K0.function: 10 kΩ, 1206. Pull-ups on the shared SPI bus (SCK and MISO lines) for the flash chip (U4).

RC0805JR-071KL.function: 1 kΩ, 0805. OPTIONAL pull-ups — install only if the STEMMA / I²C expansion ports are used.
RC0805JR-071KL.notes: Marked OPTIONAL in 1-click-bom.csv (R1, R2). Skip unless expansion is needed.

434351045816.function: Right-angle SMD tactile button (Würth). Side-mounted page navigation buttons (left and right of the device body).

JS102011SAQN.function: Right-angle SMD slide switch (C&K, SPDT). Power on/off slide switch on the device side.

TL1107AF180WQ.function: 3 × 6 mm through-hole tactile button (E-Switch). The menu / directional / select cluster under the screen. 7 placements (B3–B9).

S3B-PH-SM4-TB(LF)(SN).function: 3-pin JST PH SMD connector (STEMMA). OPTIONAL expansion port: power + I²C / GPIO for add-ons (reading light, accessibility input).

BM04B-SRSS-TB(LF)(SN).function: 4-pin JST SH SMD connector (STEMMA QT). OPTIONAL dedicated I²C expansion port.

1022.function: Dual AAA battery holder (Keystone). SMD-mounted; the 1022C retainer clip is required separately to keep cells in place.

1022C.function: Retainer clip for the Keystone 1022 battery holder. Snaps over installed AAA cells.

GDEW042T2.function: 4.2-inch B&W e-paper panel (GoodDisplay). 400 × 300 px, SPI interface, connects via FFC to the C2 driver module. Don't order the tri-color variant — it'll end in heartbreak (per the README).
GDEW042T2.notes: GDEW042T2 uses the UC8176 (IL0398) controller and is now EOL. GDEY042T81 uses the SSD1683 controller — same physical form factor and FPC connector but requires a different firmware driver. The libros codebase has drivers for both (OpenBook_IL0398 and OpenBook_SSD1683), but the pre-built book.uf2 targets IL0398 only. PR #11 on joeycastillo/libros adds auto-detection but is unmerged as of April 2026.
